name: Fresh generality suite (22 diverse cases, 2026-06-04)
description: FRESH questions covering DIFFERENT tables/columns than the tuned 30 — proves the fixes generalize (inline-enum across Bills.Status/PaymentMethod/Assets.AssetType/ServiceAccounts/WorkOrders/Maintenance, flag-strip keep+strip, grain non-regression). Authored SQL executed live = gold.

Scenarios.Question: how many paid bills are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills WHERE Status='Paid'

Scenarios.Question: how many issued bills do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills WHERE Status='Issued'

Scenarios.Question: how many bills were paid by cash
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills WHERE PaymentMethod='Cash'

Scenarios.Question: how many transformers do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Assets WHERE AssetType='Transformer'

Scenarios.Question: how many generators are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Assets WHERE AssetType='Generator'

Scenarios.Question: how many active service accounts are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ServiceAccounts WHERE Status='Active'

Scenarios.Question: how many suspended service accounts
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ServiceAccounts WHERE Status='Suspended'

Scenarios.Question: how many completed work orders
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WorkOrders WHERE Status='Completed'

Scenarios.Question: how many cancelled work orders are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WorkOrders WHERE Status='Cancelled'

Scenarios.Question: how many completed maintenance schedules
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MaintenanceSchedules WHERE Status='Completed'

Scenarios.Question: how many planned outages have we had
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Outages WHERE IsPlanned=1

Scenarios.Question: how many unplanned outages
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Outages WHERE IsPlanned=0

Scenarios.Question: top 5 departments by number of tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 d.NameEn FROM Tickets t JOIN Departments d ON t.DepartmentId=d.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted=0 GROUP BY d.Id, d.NameEn ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

Scenarios.Question: how many payments have been made
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Payments

Scenarios.Question: what is the total amount of all payments
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(Amount) FROM Payments

Scenarios.Question: how many assets do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Assets

Scenarios.Question: how many work orders are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WorkOrders

Scenarios.Question: how many service accounts do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ServiceAccounts

Scenarios.Question: how many subsidies are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Subsidies

Scenarios.Question: how many call logs do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CallLogs

Scenarios.Question: list the distinct asset types
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT AssetType FROM Assets

Scenarios.Question: how many payment methods are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PaymentMethods
